name: desktop
description: Organize, clean up, or manage files on the desktop or in folders. Use when the user wants to: organize the desktop, sort files into folders, clean up downloads, move files by type, rename files, find duplicate files, or tidy up any directory.

request.description: What to organize and how (e.g. 'organize my desktop by file type')

dry_run.description: If true, only show what would happen without moving files
